title: Consensus Protocols
concept: Implementing voting mechanisms or supervisor review to determine the winner of an agent debate.

exercises.prompt: What occurs when two AI agents with opposing views debate each other?
exercises.explain: When two AI agents debate, they can produce better quality outputs by exchanging ideas and challenging each other.

cards.title: What is a Consensus Protocol?
cards.body: A consensus protocol is a method used to agree on a decision in a debate, ensuring that the final outcome is fair and represents the opinions of involved parties.

cards.title: Introducing Voting Mechanisms
cards.body: Voting mechanisms allow groups to make decisions by collecting choices from all involved parties. This helps to find the most popular opinion.

cards.title: Debate Like a Group Project
cards.body: Think of a group project where everyone has different ideas. The group votes to choose the best idea, similar to how agents can vote to reach consensus.

cards.title: Example of Voting in Action
cards.body: Imagine two AI agents debating about story endings. After presenting their views, they use a voting mechanism to determine which ending is preferred by their supervisor.

cards.title: Incorrect Assumption About Consensus
cards.body: Many believe a consensus means everyone must agree, but it actually means finding the best solution based on the majority.

cards.title: Visualizing Consensus Mechanisms
cards.body: This shows how votes can lead to a decision in a debate.

left.text: Agent A: 65% Support for Ending A

exercises.prompt: What is the main purpose of using a voting mechanism in a debate?

options.text: To let one agent decide everything.
To fairly determine the best outcome.
To ignore the opinions of agents.

exercises.explain: A voting mechanism is used to fairly determine the best outcome based on the majority opinion.

exercises.prompt: Consensus means everyone must agree on a decision.
exercises.explain: Consensus does not require everyone to agree; it seeks the best solution based on majority preferences.

exercises.prompt: After a debate, a ___ mechanism can help decide the winning argument.
exercises.sentence: After a debate, a voting mechanism can help decide the winning argument.
exercises.explain: The correct answer is 'voting mechanism' as it specifically helps in deciding the winning argument.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is NOT a way to reach consensus in a debate?

options.text: Ignoring all feedback and choosing randomly.

exercises.explain: Ignoring all feedback and choosing randomly does not contribute to reaching a fair consensus in a debate.

exercises.prompt: What is a key benefit of implementing voting mechanisms during an AI agent debate?

options.text: Only the loudest agent is heard.
It helps to determine a fair consensus based on majority views.
All agents must agree before a decision is made.

exercises.explain: Implementing voting mechanisms allows for a fair consensus based on majority views, encouraging diverse inputs in decision-making.
